title: Publish host-pack standards, references, templates, and workflow modules
summary: Documents the final core-host-pack contract and updates workflow routing, command docs, and pack authoring guidance.
scope_items: Add or update standards, templates, command docs, and AGENTS or README surfaces for the host-pack architecture.
Create or update workflow modules and routing tables for pack integration, validation, and authoring.
done_when_items: Developers can understand how to build a future domain pack without reading implementation code first.
Workflow routing and command docs reflect the namespaced host-pack architecture.
